setDescription: **`8ball`**: Ask a question and get an answer.
**`weather`**: Shows the weather conditions of a city.
**`howgay`**: Measures how gay a person is.
**`jankenpon`**: Play a game of rock, paper, scissors.
**`rank`**: Displays the rock paper scissors ranking.
